description_long: This is a classic red fire extinguisher with a cylindrical metal body and a slightly domed top. It features a prominent black handle and lever mechanism at the top, along with a black discharge hose attached to the side, ending in a nozzle. The front of the extinguisher displays multiple instructional and safety labels, including a large white and red label and smaller pictorial instructions. A black band encircles the lower third of the body, likely for reinforcement or mounting. The rear view reveals a visible safety pin and a detailed inspection label, while the hose is secured along the side. The extinguisher's surface shows some wear, giving it a realistic, slightly used appearance.
description: A red cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black handle, discharge hose, and multiple instructional labels on the front. The body is slightly worn, with a safety pin and inspection label visible on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main instructional labels, black handle, and hose attached to the side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the inspection label, safety pin, and the back of the handle assembly.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the smooth red body, black band, and the hose running along the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the hose fully visible, secured vertically along the body, and the safety pin at the top.
attribute_label_or_signage: Multiple instructional and safety labels are present on the front and back, including a large red and white label, pictorial instructions, and a detailed inspection label. Labels are rectangular and mostly white with red and black text.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A black band encircles the lower third of the body, possibly for mounting, but no explicit bracket or holder is visible.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black discharge hose is attached to the side, approximately the length of the extinguisher body, ending in a nozzle and secured vertically along the body.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible at the top near the handle, secured with a ring.
